title: ophrys subfusca
intro: Ophrys subfusca, also known as the southern bee orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ophrys subfusca are said to include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ophrys subfusca typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots and leaves, which are used to treat various ailments.
